3=Behavior of this type occurred daily
^=Blank (skip pattern)
165 E0200C_OTHR_BHVRL_CD E0200C_OTHR_BHVRL_CD E0200C Behavior: Other Behavioral Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident has other behavioral
